---
title: "Publications"
---

*For the most current list, see my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=oPz_JBcAAAAJ).*

---

## Journal Articles

### 2025

**The Differentiation and Regeneration Potential of ABCB5⁺ Mesenchymal Stem Cells: A Review and Clinical Perspectives**
**Z He**, V Starkuviene, M Keese
*Journal of Clinical Medicine*, 14(3), 660
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.3390/jcm14030660) · 3 citations

---

### 2021

**Crosstalk between venous thromboembolism and periodontal diseases: a bioinformatics analysis**
**Z He**, Q Jiang, F Li, M Chen
*Disease Markers*, 2021(1), 1776567
[[DOI]](https://doi.org/10.1155/2021/1776567) · 16 citations

---

### 2020

**Application of sandwich technique in preserving internal iliac artery during endovascular treatment for abdominal aortic aneurysm involving common iliac artery**
H Zheng, Y Haiyan, F Jian, S Jianming
*[Journal details]*
<!-- Verify authorship and add DOI if applicable -->

---

## Manuscripts in Preparation

- **Bioinformatics-driven identification of VSMC phenotypic switch modulators** — *Target: ATVB*, submission planned W25 2026
